creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: bdrewery

Log:
  Fix bugzilla dfilter script to handle:
    1. Multiple PR per line
    2. Multiple PR
    3. PR lines with extra stuff after them such as references and (notes)

  PR:		191064 [2]
